version: X12 CARC/RARC — WPC published list, relevant to NCCI/LCD/NCD denial reasoning

carc.CO-4: Inconsistent modifier or modifier/procedure code combination
carc.CO-15: Payment adjusted because authorization or precertification was missing
carc.CO-16: Claim/service lacks information which is needed for adjudication
carc.CO-22: This care may be covered by another payer per coordination of benefits
carc.CO-29: Time limit for filing has expired
carc.CO-45: Charges exceed your contracted/legislated fee arrangement
carc.CO-50: Non-covered services — not deemed a medical necessity
carc.CO-57: Payment denied/reduced because the payer deems the information submitted does not support this level of service
carc.CO-97: Payment is included in the allowance for another service/procedure that has already been adjudicated
carc.CO-109: Claim/service not covered by this payer/contractor; you must send the claim/service to the correct payer/contractor
carc.CO-119: Benefit maximum for this time period has been reached
carc.CO-167: This (these) diagnosis(es) is (are) not covered; additional information is needed
carc.CO-170: Payment is denied when performed/billed by this type of provider
carc.CO-236: This procedure or procedure/modifier combination is not compatible with another procedure or procedure/modifier combination provided on the same day according to the National Correct Coding Initiative or workers compensation state regulations/fee schedule

rarc.N56: Missing or incomplete note from referring physician
rarc.N109: Alert: Not covered unless the patient is in a medical necessity qualifying stay
rarc.N115: This decision was based on a Local Coverage Determination (LCD)
rarc.N130: Consult plan benefit documents or the member's summary plan description for information about this benefit
rarc.N342: Alert: The provider acting as a health plan should fill out this claim form
rarc.N381: Alert: Alert: This response is based on the submitted procedure code
rarc.N520: Alert: Payment made based on a jurisdiction cost-to-charge ratio
rarc.N522: Procedure code and modifier are inconsistent with each other
rarc.N600: Alert: Consult the NCCI guidelines for correct coding of this service
